version_description: Based on studio album. Standard chords used.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: We Could Belong To Each Other

recommended.version_description: This is his latest version which is tuned up a step.

content:
[Intro]
[ch]G2[/ch] [ch]A2/C#[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]G2[/ch] [ch]A2/C#[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D2[/ch]               [ch]A/C#[/ch]
   Your face is beaming,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]    [ch]D/A[/ch]                    [ch]A/G[/ch]  [ch]G2[/ch]
   You say it's cause you're dreaming,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]          [ch]Bbmaj9[/ch] [ch]Em7b5/A[/ch]
Of how good it's  go  -  ing   to be.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D2[/ch]                [ch]A/C#[/ch]
   You say you've been around,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]D/A[/ch]             [ch]A/G[/ch]        [ch]G2[/ch]
     And now, you've finally found,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                  [ch]D2/F#[/ch]
   Everything you've wanted,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E7/G#[/ch]      [ch]Asus[/ch]    [ch]A/C#[/ch]
And needed in me.[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]F#m/A[/ch]  [ch]G2[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
I don't have the   heart,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A2/C#[/ch]
To hurt you.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G/B[/ch]          [ch]A/C#[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
It's the last thing I want to do.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]A/E[/ch]  [ch]Bm/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/A[/ch]  [ch]G2[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
But I   don't have the   heart,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A2/C#[/ch]
To love you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G2/B[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D2[/ch]  [ch]Gm/Bb[/ch] [ch]A7sus[/ch] [ch]A7[/ch]
      Not the way you want me to.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D2[/ch]             [ch]A/C#[/ch]
   Inside I'm dying,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]D/A[/ch]        [ch]A/G[/ch]   [ch]G2[/ch]
     To see you cry - ing,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]      [ch]Bbmaj9[/ch]  [ch]Em7b5/A[/ch]
How can I make    you     understand?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D2[/ch]         [ch]A/C#[/ch]
   I care about you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]D/A[/ch]       [ch]A/G[/ch]   [ch]G2[/ch]
     So much about you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]D2/F#[/ch]
    I'm trying to say this,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E7/G#[/ch]      [ch]Asus[/ch]   [ch]A/C#[/ch]
As gently as I can,       'cause...[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]F#m/A[/ch]  [ch]G2[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
I don't have the   heart,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A2/C#[/ch]
To hurt you.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G/B[/ch]          [ch]A/C#[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
It's the last thing I want to do.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]A/E[/ch]  [ch]Bm/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/A[/ch]  [ch]G2[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
But I   don't have the   heart,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A2/C#[/ch]
To love you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G2/B[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D2[/ch]
      Not the way you want me to.[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]F#7sus[/ch]     [ch]F#7[/ch]  [ch]F#7sus[/ch] [ch]F#7[/ch]
    You're so trusting and open,[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bm7[/ch]                       [ch]Em7b5/Bb[/ch]
Hoping that love will start.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D/A[/ch]                [ch]A7sus[/ch]
But I don't have the heart,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/A[/ch]               [ch]A7sus[/ch]  [ch]A7[/ch]
I don't have the heart.[/tab]

[Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]F#m/A[/ch]  [ch]G2[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
I don't have the   heart,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A2/C#[/ch]
To hurt you.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G/B[/ch]          [ch]A/C#[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
It's the last thing I want to do.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]A/E[/ch]  [ch]Bm/D[/ch] [ch]F#m/A[/ch]  [ch]G2[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
But I   don't have the   heart,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A2/C#[/ch]
To love you.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G/B[/ch]     [ch]A/C#[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Not the way you want me to.[/tab]

[Coda]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]  [ch]B/D#[/ch]  [ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]G#m/B[/ch]  [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
I  don't have the   heart...[/tab]


[ch]B2/D#[/ch]  [ch]A2/C#[/ch]  [ch]B2/D#[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]

[tab][ch]E/G#[/ch]  [ch]B/F#[/ch]  [ch]C#m/E[/ch] [ch]G#m/B[/ch]  [ch]Amaj7[/ch]
I     don't have   the  heart... (repeat till fade)[/tab]
